name: Fantastic Artichoke Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichokes well and tear them apart with your fingers.
2. Cut up the pita bread into chip size triangles. Separate the pieces and bake on a cookie sheet until crispy (approximately 5 minutes).
3. Combine all other ingredients in a bowl and mash everything together.
4. Bake the mixture in an uncovered casserole dish for approximately 30 minutes at 350°F, or until bubbly.
5. Serve hot out of the oven and scoop up the dip with pita bread.
